TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kgi ga 'yaya stinun naha, kgi ga pnuhi na Tayal nanak, kutun naha kgi laga, mkgi ro bkuyan naha wayey kya, ro stinun naha lukus Tayal kya. kilgal kbaley lukus nya sbiru suruw: gmegey nuka:kutun naha kgi laga slayun naha abow kgi, hakut naha ro cyan naha bih kyan syasiy kya, s'agal naha ruma ro kgusun naha yula', ro mkgi naha, ro srpux naha kgi ro gmegey naha nuka ro wagan naha bulit ro pgyan naha tanux. p'ubuy wayey ro bkuy wayey: slyun kwara nuka gnegey naha ro inbuyan naha kwara wayey. phagay wayey: s'agal naha phgayan wayey ro phagey wayey, tmwang khtuw ro musa hyuti ci ha'iy wayey. tmahu' wayey: tmagan 'sya ro bulit wayey ro thkun iyik bih tupih, sa'ing tmuting tpuyan ta, inwaxan urow nya ro galun syup nya, ro musa mlabuw wayey. "gaga cinmagan wayey hiya, tgmagan bulit ga musa mlabuw wayey haca, tmagan maci ro thpuyan ga musa mtalah, ro mtalah ha'iy." kkbalay na latan Tayan hiya maga mutuw naha skahun sku kgiy muwah kbalay,utux utux sali ga niya mmuhiy na kgiy, kgiy hani ga aw mutuw pinhyun sku ryax na tmangu abaw, 'bagan, ru mshuw abaw. pinhyun nya sku rhyan hiya ga siki msmi tikay ru blay ms'uraw na rhyan, pyang blay ga siki mtesuruw na syax witux mutuw yenga pinhtgan sa wawi ru kthuy helaw balay mrkyas, ana wayay nuka nya ga mutuw blay pinhtgan nya. sraral kgi ga klayun ta lukus ru pala. Bnrwan qa galan cpung 教育部-朗聲四起
S.PHON: kɣi ɣa ʔjaja s~ɕtinun naħa, kɣi ɣa pnuħi na tajal nanak, kutun naħa kɣi laɣa, mkɣi ro βkujan naħa wajej kja, ro s~ɕtinun naħa lukus~ɕ tajal kja. kilɣal kβalej lukus~ɕ nja s~ɕβiru s~ɕuruw: ɣmeɣej nuka:kutun naħa kɣi laɣa s~ɕlajun naħa aβow kɣi, ħakut naħa ro ʦ~ʨjan naħa βiħ kjan s~ɕjas~ɕij kja, s~ɕʔaɣal naħa ruma ro kɣus~ɕun naħa julaʔ, ro mkɣi naħa, ro s~ɕrpux naħa kɣi ro ɣmeɣej naħa nuka ro waɣan naħa βulit ro pɣjan naħa tanux. pʔuβuj wajej ro βkuj wajej: s~ɕljun kwara nuka ɣneɣej naħa ro inβujan naħa kwara wajej. pħaɣaj wajej: s~ɕʔaɣal naħa pħɣajan wajej ro pħaɣej wajej, tmwaŋ kħtuw ro mus~ɕa ħjuti ʦ~ʨi ħaʔij wajej. tmaħuʔ wajej: tmaɣan ʔs~ɕja ro βulit wajej ro tħkun ijik βiħ tupiħ, s~ɕaʔiŋ tmutiŋ tpujan ta, inwaxan urow nja ro ɣalun s~ɕjup nja, ro mus~ɕa mlaβuw wajej. "ɣaɣa ʦ~ʨinmaɣan wajej ħija, tɣmaɣan βulit ɣa mus~ɕa mlaβuw wajej ħaʦ~ʨa, tmaɣan maʦ~ʨi ro tħpujan ɣa mus~ɕa mtalaħ, ro mtalaħ ħaʔij." kkβalaj na latan tajan ħija maɣa mutuw naħa s~ɕkaħun s~ɕku kɣij muwaħ kβalaj,utux utux s~ɕali ɣa nija mmuħij na kɣij, kɣij ħani ɣa aw mutuw pinħjun s~ɕku rjax na tmaŋu aβaw, ʔβaɣan, ru ms~ɕħuw aβaw. pinħjun nja s~ɕku rħjan ħija ɣa s~ɕiki ms~ɕmi tikaj ru βlaj ms~ɕʔuraw na rħjan, pjaŋ βlaj ɣa s~ɕiki mtes~ɕuruw na s~ɕjax witux mutuw jeŋa pinħtɣan s~ɕa wawi ru ktħuj ħelaw βalaj mrkjas~ɕ, ana wajaj nuka nja ɣa mutuw βlaj pinħtɣan nja. s~ɕraral kɣi ɣa klajun ta lukus~ɕ ru pala. βnrwan qa ɣalan ʦ~ʨpuŋ ***-****
S.FORM: kgi ga 'yaya stinun naha, kgi ga pnuhi na Tayal nanak, kutun naha kgi laga, mkgi ro bkuyan naha wayey kya, ro stinun naha lukus Tayal kya. kilgal kbaley lukus nya sbiru suruw: gmegey nuka:kutun naha kgi laga slayun naha abow kgi, hakut naha ro cyan naha bih kyan syasiy kya, s'agal naha ruma ro kgusun naha yula', ro mkgi naha, ro srpux naha kgi ro gmegey naha nuka ro wagan naha bulit ro pgyan naha tanux. p'ubuy wayey ro bkuy wayey: slyun kwara nuka gnegey naha ro inbuyan naha kwara wayey. phagay wayey: s'agal naha phgayan wayey ro phagey wayey, tmwang khtuw ro musa hyuti ci ha'iy wayey. tmahu' wayey: tmagan 'sya ro bulit wayey ro thkun iyik bih tupih, sa'ing tmuting tpuyan ta, inwaxan urow nya ro galun syup nya, ro musa mlabuw wayey. "gaga cinmagan wayey hiya, tgmagan bulit ga musa mlabuw wayey haca, tmagan maci ro thpuyan ga musa mtalah, ro mtalah ha'iy." kkbalay na latan Tayan hiya maga mutuw naha skahun sku kgiy muwah kbalay,utux utux sali ga niya mmuhiy na kgiy, kgiy hani ga aw mutuw pinhyun sku ryax na tmangu abaw, 'bagan, ru mshuw abaw. pinhyun nya sku rhyan hiya ga siki msmi tikay ru blay ms'uraw na rhyan, pyang blay ga siki mtesuruw na syax witux mutuw yenga pinhtgan sa wawi ru kthuy helaw balay mrkyas, ana wayay nuka nya ga mutuw blay pinhtgan nya. sraral kgi ga klayun ta lukus ru pala. Bnrwan qa galan cpung 教育部-朗聲四起
S.PHON: kɣi ɣa ʔjaja s~ɕtinun naħa, kɣi ɣa pnuħi na tajal nanak, kutun naħa kɣi laɣa, mkɣi ro βkujan naħa wajej kja, ro s~ɕtinun naħa lukus~ɕ tajal kja. kilɣal kβalej lukus~ɕ nja s~ɕβiru s~ɕuruw: ɣmeɣej nuka:kutun naħa kɣi laɣa s~ɕlajun naħa aβow kɣi, ħakut naħa ro ʦ~ʨjan naħa βiħ kjan s~ɕjas~ɕij kja, s~ɕʔaɣal naħa ruma ro kɣus~ɕun naħa julaʔ, ro mkɣi naħa, ro s~ɕrpux naħa kɣi ro ɣmeɣej naħa nuka ro waɣan naħa βulit ro pɣjan naħa tanux. pʔuβuj wajej ro βkuj wajej: s~ɕljun kwara nuka ɣneɣej naħa ro inβujan naħa kwara wajej. pħaɣaj wajej: s~ɕʔaɣal naħa pħɣajan wajej ro pħaɣej wajej, tmwaŋ kħtuw ro mus~ɕa ħjuti ʦ~ʨi ħaʔij wajej. tmaħuʔ wajej: tmaɣan ʔs~ɕja ro βulit wajej ro tħkun ijik βiħ tupiħ, s~ɕaʔiŋ tmutiŋ tpujan ta, inwaxan urow nja ro ɣalun s~ɕjup nja, ro mus~ɕa mlaβuw wajej. "ɣaɣa ʦ~ʨinmaɣan wajej ħija, tɣmaɣan βulit ɣa mus~ɕa mlaβuw wajej ħaʦ~ʨa, tmaɣan maʦ~ʨi ro tħpujan ɣa mus~ɕa mtalaħ, ro mtalaħ ħaʔij." kkβalaj na latan tajan ħija maɣa mutuw naħa s~ɕkaħun s~ɕku kɣij muwaħ kβalaj,utux utux s~ɕali ɣa nija mmuħij na kɣij, kɣij ħani ɣa aw mutuw pinħjun s~ɕku rjax na tmaŋu aβaw, ʔβaɣan, ru ms~ɕħuw aβaw. pinħjun nja s~ɕku rħjan ħija ɣa s~ɕiki ms~ɕmi tikaj ru βlaj ms~ɕʔuraw na rħjan, pjaŋ βlaj ɣa s~ɕiki mtes~ɕuruw na s~ɕjax witux mutuw jeŋa pinħtɣan s~ɕa wawi ru ktħuj ħelaw βalaj mrkjas~ɕ, ana wajaj nuka nja ɣa mutuw βlaj pinħtɣan nja. s~ɕraral kɣi ɣa klajun ta lukus~ɕ ru pala. βnrwan qa ɣalan ʦ~ʨpuŋ ***-****
